location: A 2% drop from sword-and-shield Beastmen of Farum Azula. One reliable spawn is just past the Crumbling Beast Grave Depths Site of Grace, patrolling alongside a dog.
tactics: From the Crumbling Beast Grave Depths grace, push forward to find the sword-and-shield Beastman traveling with a dog companion — deal with the dog first so it doesn't harass you mid-fight.
Only the sword-and-shield variant carries this shield; the throwing-knife variant does not.
2% is a low drop rate, so plan on several grace-rest-and-repeat kills.
lore: Fashioned from a large broken jar, reflecting the Farum Azula beastmen's practice of firing oversized clay vessels specifically to be worn as shields.

builds.name: Budget elemental block
builds.why: Lightweight at 5.0 with surprisingly strong fire, lightning, and holy negation despite its middling E Strength scaling, useful as a situational elemental off-hand.
